all.title: Carney, Smith confirm energy announcement coming Friday
all.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney and Alberta Premier Danielle Smith have confirmed they'll be in Calgary on Friday to announce the next step in their landmark energy pact.

all.title: B.C. symposium puts spotlight on dangers associated with strangulation
all.description: Charuka Maheswaran was 29 when she met the man she would later marry, have three children with, and who she said eventually beat and strangled her.
